zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William De Swinburne於1352年出生在英國諾圖波藍德貝維其可-朋-特維德時，他的父親Sir William de Swinburne of Capheaton25歲，母親Joan de Ogle20歲。他於1375年與Lady Mary de Heton在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1391年10月6日享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William De Swinburne于1352年出生在英国諾圖波藍德貝維其可-朋-特維德时，他的父亲Sir William de Swinburne of Capheaton25岁，母亲Joan de Ogle20岁。他于1375年与Lady Mary de Heton在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1391年10月6日享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Swinburne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham): habitational name primarily from Great and Little Swinburne (Northumberland), but perhaps also occasionally from one or other places similarly named, from Old English swīn ‘pig’ + burna ‘stream’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William De Swinburne was born in 1352, in Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, England, his father, Sir William de Swinburne of Capheaton, was 25 and his mother, Joan de Ogle, was 20. He married Lady Mary de Heton in 1375, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 6 October 1391, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William De Swinburne est né en 1352, à Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Swinburne of Capheaton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Joan de Ogle, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Mary de Heton en 1375, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 6 octobre 1391, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William De Swinburne 1352 in Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Swinburne of Capheaton 25 und seine Mutter Joan de Ogle 20. Er hat 1375 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Lady Mary de Heton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Oktober 1391 im Alter von 39 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William De Swinburne è nato il nel 1352 nel Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Sir William de Swinburne of Capheaton, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Ogle, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lady Mary de Heton nel 1375, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 6 ottobre 1391, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William De Swinburneが1352年にイギリスノースウンバーランドバーウィク-ウプオン-トウィードで生まれた時，父Sir William de Swinburne of Capheatonは25歳，母Joan de Ogleは20歳であった。1375年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドでLady Mary de Hetonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1391年10月6日に39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William De Swinburne(이)가 1352년 영국 노르스벌랜드 버윅-업-트위드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Swinburne of Capheaton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Ogle(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1375년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 Lady Mary de Heton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1391년 10월 6일 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William De Swinburne nasceu em 1352, em Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Swinburne of Capheaton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Ogle, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Mary de Heton em 1375, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de outubro de 1391, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William De Swinburne родился в 1352 г. в местности бирвикк-упон-твид, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William de Swinburne of Capheaton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Ogle, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Mary de Heton в 1375 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 6 октября 1391 г. в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William De Swinburne nació en 1352, en Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Swinburne of Capheaton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Joan de Ogle, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Lady Mary de Heton en 1375, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 6 de octubre de 1391, a la edad de 39 años.
